turns.user_message: I was just sitting on the couch earlier and my heart started thumping for no reason. It's been happening off and on for a few weeks now.
That random tightness in my chest is becoming a regular thing and it's really unsettling. I keep waiting for the next time it will happen.
Now I feel like I'm constantly on edge, bracing for that wave of dread to hit me out of nowhere. It's exhausting to feel this way all the time.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment. This has been going on for a while.
